---
title: "PyFixest architecture"
description: "Canonical guide to PyFixest's dependency layers, estimation pipeline, model capabilities, state, caches, Rust kernels, and numerical tests."
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
toc-location: left
---

This page is rendered from the canonical repository document
[`ARCHITECTURE.md`](https://github.com/py-econometrics/pyfixest/blob/master/ARCHITECTURE.md).

{{< include ../ARCHITECTURE.md >}}
